channel.title: Open Source Alternative Finder on OSSAF - Open Source Alternative Finder
channel.description: Recent content in Open Source Alternative Finder on OSSAF - Open Source Alternative Finder

item.title: Adobe Photoshop
item.description:
Adobe Photoshop → GIMP

Software Information

  • Commercial software: Adobe Photoshop
  • Open source alternative: GIMP
  • Vendor: Adobe
  • License: GPL-3.0

Feature Comparison

Feature Photoshop GIMP
Layer editing ✅ ✅
Filters & effects ✅ ✅
RAW processing ✅ ⚠️ Plugin needed
CMYK mode ✅ ⚠️ Plugin needed
Vector tools ✅ Limited

Advantages

  • Completely free
  • Open source code
  • Cross-platform support (Windows/macOS/Linux)

Disadvantages

  • Steeper learning curve
  • Some professional features missing
  • Different keyboard shortcuts

Migration Difficulty

Medium — Basic operations are similar, but keyboard shortcuts and the location of some features differ. Recommended learning resources: GIMP official documentation and community tutorials.

item.title: Figma
item.description:
Figma → Penpot

Software Information

  • Commercial software: Figma
  • Open source alternative: Penpot
  • Vendor: Figma Inc.
  • License: MPL-2.0

Feature Comparison

Feature Figma Penpot
Vector editing ✅ ✅
Components ✅ ✅
Real-time collaboration ✅ ✅
Self-hosting ❌ ✅
SVG-native ⚠️ Export only ✅
Prototyping ✅ ✅

Advantages

  • Open source, self-hostable
  • SVG-native design files
  • Cross-platform (browser-based)
  • Free for teams

Disadvantages

  • Smaller plugin ecosystem
  • Performance with very large files
  • Fewer ready-made templates

Migration Difficulty

Medium — Figma files can be imported via SVG export. Component structure may need manual rebuilding. Penpot continues to improve Figma import support.

item.title: Notion
item.description:
Notion → Obsidian

Software Information

  • Commercial software: Notion
  • Open source alternative: Obsidian
  • Vendor: Notion Labs
  • License: Proprietary core / Open plugin ecosystem

Feature Comparison

Feature Notion Obsidian
Markdown notes ✅ ✅
Database / tables ✅ ⚠️ Via plugins
Real-time collaboration ✅ ⚠️ Via Sync
Offline access ⚠️ Limited ✅
Local storage ❌ ✅
Bidirectional links ✅ ✅

Advantages

  • Local-first storage, full control of your data
  • Rich plugin ecosystem
  • Fast, offline-ready
  • Bidirectional linking for knowledge graphs

Disadvantages

  • Collaboration features require paid sync
  • Steeper learning curve for non-technical users
  • Database features less powerful than Notion

Migration Difficulty

Medium-High — Note structures can be exported as Markdown, but Notion databases and views need to be reorganized as Obsidian properties or plugin-based tables.

item.title: Search
item.description: Search across all commercial software alternatives in OSSAF.

item.title: Slack
item.description:
Slack → Element

Software Information

  • Commercial software: Slack
  • Open source alternative: Element
  • Vendor: Salesforce
  • License: AGPL-3.0 (built on Matrix protocol)

Feature Comparison

Feature Slack Element
Channels ✅ ✅
Direct messages ✅ ✅
Threads ✅ ✅
End-to-end encryption ⚠️ Enterprise only ✅ Default
Self-hosting ❌ ✅
Voice/video calls ✅ ✅
Bots & integrations ✅ ✅

Advantages

  • Decentralized protocol (Matrix)
  • Default end-to-end encryption
  • Self-hostable for full data sovereignty
  • Federated communication across servers

Disadvantages

  • Less polished UX than Slack
  • Smaller integration marketplace
  • Server administration overhead if self-hosting

Migration Difficulty

Medium — Channel structure maps directly, but Slack-specific apps and workflows must be replaced with Matrix bots and bridges. Users need to adapt to a federated identity model.

item.title: Zoom
item.description:
Zoom → BigBlueButton

Software Information

  • Commercial software: Zoom
  • Open source alternative: BigBlueButton
  • Vendor: Zoom Communications
  • License: LGPL-3.0

Feature Comparison

Feature Zoom BigBlueButton
HD video ✅ ✅
Screen sharing ✅ ✅
Recording ✅ ✅
Breakout rooms ✅ ✅
Self-hosting ❌ ✅
Whiteboard ⚠️ Limited ✅
Polls & quizzes ✅ ✅
Large webinars ✅ ⚠️ Needs tuning

Advantages

  • Purpose-built for education and training
  • Open source, self-hostable
  • Strong whiteboard and engagement tools
  • No per-user licensing cost

Disadvantages

  • Requires server administration
  • Less suited for large enterprise webinars
  • Mobile experience less polished

Migration Difficulty

Medium-High — Best fit for education / training use cases. Scheduling and LMS integration need reconfiguration. Hardware sizing for self-hosting requires planning.
